value.title: MCP — daily Grail budget exceeded (> 500 GB / 24h)
value.description: Fires a single environment-wide alert when total MCP-driven Grail scan volume exceeds the 500 GB daily budget over a rolling 24h window. The query returns at most one row, so exactly one alert fires; it closes automatically when total consumption drops back under budget.

input.value:
fetch dt.system.events, from: -24h
| filter event.kind == "QUERY_EXECUTION_EVENT" and contains(client.client_context, "dynatrace-mcp")
| summarize scanned_bytes = sum(scanned_bytes), queries = countDistinct(query_id), users = countDistinct(user.email)
| fieldsAdd scanned_gb = round(scanned_bytes / 1000000000.0, decimals: 2)
| filter scanned_bytes > 500000000000

properties.value: MCP daily Grail budget exceeded: {scanned_gb} GB in 24h
MCP-driven queries scanned {scanned_gb} GB across {queries} queries by {users} users in the last 24h, exceeding the 500 GB daily budget.
